reference.title: GUIDES-35436: Editor scroll and TOC visibility (fix 2605)
reference.shortdesc: Customer request from Hyundai: Web Editor scrollbar and viewport jump while editing large content or reference links; table of contents loses position. Fix version 2605.

section.title: Summary
section.p: The scroll bar in the editing screen moves, causing the screen to scroll up.

section.title: Description
section.p: When editing a large section of content or adding reference links, the scroll bar moves, making it difficult to check the table of contents being edited.

ul.li: When working on a large section of content, the table of contents often scrolls to the top instead of the center, or is not visible.
Editing a large section of content

section.title: Workflow notes
section.p: Engineering requested a demo recording for clarity. Internal verification on the New Editor with large table editing did not reproduce the scrolling issue; ticket closed as fixed with fix version 2605.
